title: Behavioral contract (architect output, phase 2)
description: Black-box observable scenarios. Drives verification phase fanout. Each scenario is implementable as a single test with trigger + effect + preconditions.

domain_invariants.description: Domain formulas the architect locks in for downstream phases. Mirrors requirement_contract.standard_formulas (when present) but binds each formula to a worked input/output table verification will run as data-driven tests. Empty array allowed only when the requirement contract has no standard_formulas. Implementation must match the formula bit-for-bit; deviations are rejected at code review.

domain_invariant.description: One domain formula plus a worked example table. 'formula' is single-line language-agnostic pseudocode; verification phase generates one test case per example. At least 5 examples required, including at least one edge case (boundary / clamp / overflow / empty).
